title: Update vendor on urfave/cli to support single character booleans
body:
Many other fixes have been made in urfave/cli

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but it looks like the change upset a couple of bats tests.
Do we need to be setting `UseShortOptionHandling` in our `cli.Command` structures to allow combining of short options?
@nalind You are taking this one over correct?
